display_information.name: CornerCheck
display_information.description: Fail-closed fighter-clearance agent: suspensions, return windows, audit trail.
display_information.long_description: CornerCheck helps fight-operations teams, matchmakers, and athletic commissions confirm whether a fighter is safe and cleared to compete. It checks curated, source-cited cross-jurisdiction medical suspension records, enforces Association of Ringside Physicians return-to-competition windows, surfaces injury mentions from your own Slack with permalink citations, and refuses to clear when fighter identity is ambiguous. Decision support only: a human always makes the final call, and every decision lands in a tamper-evident audit ledger.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Ask whether a fighter is cleared to compete. I check suspensions, return windows, and your team's own injury chatter, and I refuse to clear ambiguous identities.

suggested_prompts.title: Check a fighter
suggested_prompts.message: Is Junior dos Santos cleared in Texas?

suggested_prompts.title: Check a whole card
suggested_prompts.message: Check this card in Texas: Junior dos Santos vs Curtis Blaydes, Bruno Silva vs Brad Tavares

suggested_prompts.title: Ambiguous name
suggested_prompts.message: Is Bruno Silva cleared to fight?

suggested_prompts.title: Famous case
suggested_prompts.message: Is Jon Jones cleared to fight in California?

check_fighter_clearance.title: Check fighter clearance
check_fighter_clearance.description: Fail-closed clearance check: CLEAR, DO_NOT_CLEAR, NEEDS_PICK, or NOT_FOUND, with the blocking record cited. Never auto-clears.

fighter_name.title: Fighter name
fighter_name.description: Full name of the fighter to check
fighter_name.name: fighter_name

jurisdiction.title: Jurisdiction (optional)
jurisdiction.description: Where the bout would happen, e.g. Texas
jurisdiction.name: jurisdiction

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: The cited blocker or the decision-support note
detail.name: detail
